code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43
  if in_num
    if is_digit
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else
      let signed = val * sign
      if signed > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
      in_num = false
      val = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else
    if is_digit
      in_num = true
      val = b - 48
    else if is_sign
      in_num = true
      val = 0
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else
        sign = 1
      end
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let signed = val * sign
  if signed > 0
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
